title: Baby Animals and Rabbit model Backport
description: Backport of all current baby and rabbit models from 26.1 down to 1.19.4!
body:
![Title and line of animals standing beneath](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aUpm1CVj/images/bdcc675f60ba3d448d340fffd12cf56a6589b693.png) **Backported all current baby and rabbit models from 26.1 down to 1.19.4!**

1.21.11 to 1.19.4 compatible (could be compatible below that but not tested)
Requires OptiFine or ETF/EMF
This pack is purely cosmetic, it does not change the original mobs coding (hitboxes may not be accurate)

Features/Bugs/Inconsistencies

Features: - Adds new baby models and textures from 26.1 - Fixed z-fighting and pivot points in original snapshot models Bugs/Inconsistencies: - No support for Dolphin and Squid/Glowsquid as babies can't spawn in past versions - No new Rabbit animations - Inconsistent hitboxes (Rabbit hitboxes are much smaller than the model)

Tutorial

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order to prevent texture issues, this pack should be at the TOP of your Resource Pack list.
